info.title: DevEx Despatch API
info.description: API for handling Category 2 despatch documents, API key management, and web app session routes. Request a key via the Getting Started section below. ⚠️ Note: v1 protected requests use an Api-Key header. v2 web app routes use session-cookie auth (no Api-Key required). ⚠️ User registration is intended to be completed through the web GUI, because the production flow includes a Cloudflare Turnstile challenge and the GUI supplies the required token. ⚡ The brand new v2 API is powered by chalksniffer's Ordering API and lastminutepush's Invoicing API - thank you to those groups for making our lives easier! 📩 If you have any questions/suggestions/change requests, contact us at devex@platform.tcore.network. Thanks for using :) - DevEx team.

tags.name: Getting Started
tags.description: Start here: request your API key, register through the web GUI, then create and clear web app session cookies via login/logout. Session cookies are short-lived and expire after one week.

tags.name: Despatch
tags.description: Create, retrieve, and list despatch advice documents.

tags.name: Despatch Cancellation
tags.description: Order and fulfilment cancellation endpoints for despatch advice documents.

tags.name: Document Validation
tags.description: Validate supported XML document types against server-side schemas.

tags.name: Web App v2 Orders
tags.description: Session-authenticated v2 order creation, upload, retrieval, and deletion routes used by the web app.

tags.name: Web App v2 Despatch

tags.name: Developers Only
tags.description: Internal API key management routes - intended for DevEx team members only.

SessionCookieAuth.name: devex.sid
SessionCookieAuth.description: Session cookie set after web app authentication.

error.example: Request body must contain raw XML data

contactEmail.description: Primary contact email. Must be a UNSW domain (ad.unsw.edu.au, student.unsw.edu.au, or unsw.edu.au).

contactName.description: Primary contact person who will receive API and contact emails from us.

message.example: API key created successfully - an email will be sent to the specified email address. **Allow two minutes for it to get through UNSW spam filter, and check your junk folder!**

turnstileToken.description: Required by the web GUI when the registration challenge is enabled.

example: Invalid email or password.

timeout-or-duplicate

Request body must be a JSON object.

message.example: [broken-order.xml] File did not include XML content.

V2DocumentUploadEntry.description: A single uploaded XML document. The server accepts xml/content/rawXml as payload aliases.

V2OrderCreateRequest.description: Payload used by /api/v2/user/order/create. data must contain a valid UBL-like Order payload.

data.description: Order payload containing ID, IssueDate, BuyerCustomerParty, SellerSupplierParty, and OrderLine entries.

get.description: Returns current service health, uptime, and API version.

post.description: Use this registration endpoint to request your team's API key. If an address already has a key (i.e. you lost it), the service resends the existing key details by email.

400.description: Missing required fields or invalid UNSW contactEmail format

500.description: Internal server error occured - try again later.

post.description: Registers a new user account. In production, this flow is intended to run through the web GUI so the Cloudflare Turnstile challenge can supply the required token. The API is documented here for reference, but the GUI is the supported registration path.

400.description: Invalid registration payload or Turnstile verification failure

500.description: Internal server error occurred while registering the user

post.description: Authenticates a registered user and returns the devex.sid session cookie used for /api/v2/user/* routes. Session cookies expire after one week.

200.description: Login successful and session cookie issued

403.description: Email address is not verified yet

500.description: Internal server error occurred while creating session

post.description: Destroys the current devex.sid session and clears the cookie. Use this to explicitly end the one-week session.

200.description: Logout successful and session cookie cleared

500.description: Internal server error occurred while clearing session

post.summary: Create despatch advice records from order XML
post.description: Accepts raw order XML and creates one or more despatch advice records for the calling API key.

401.description: Missing or invalid issued API key

500.description: Internal server error occured - try again later.

get.description: Finds a despatch advice either by advice-id UUID or by providing an order XML document.

parameters.name: search-type
parameters.description: Search mode: advice-id for UUID lookup, or order for order XML lookup.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The value to search with. Provide a UUID when search-type=advice-id, or raw order XML when search-type=order.

401.description: Missing or invalid issued API key

404.description: Despatch advice not found (this will also occur if you try to retrieve another team's advice)

500.description: Internal server error occured - try again later.

get.summary: List despatch advice records for the current API key
get.description: Returns all despatch advice records associated with the calling API key.

500.description: Internal server error occured - try again later.
